title: Croatian Crumble Bread
description: A delicious Indian-inspired bread topped with a crunchy crumble made from Croatian bread and perfect for snacking.
instructions: 2. Tear the Croatian bread into small pieces and blend into crumbs.
3. Mix the crunchy crumbs and flour in a bowl.
4. Add the herb to the bowl and mix well.
5. Add the crumb from previous bread and mix until well combined.
6. Place the mixture onto a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
